policy.principle: All grammar topics extractable from the local source PDFs are canonical requirements for Sanskript design.
policy.copyright_boundary: The ledger stores metadata, outline topics, and sutra identifiers; it does not copy full PDF text.

coverage_statuses.canon_indexed: Indexed from a source PDF and accepted as part of the language-design canon.
coverage_statuses.implemented: Complete discrete Paninian executable logic with positive and negative behavioral tests.
coverage_statuses.partial: Some compiler support exists, but the topic is not fully implemented.
coverage_statuses.batch_partial: A whole sutra cluster is supported by a subsystem scaffold, but individual sutras are not complete.
coverage_statuses.pending_design: Not yet implemented; must be addressed before the language can be considered complete.
